title: sisyrinchium junceum var. asperulum
intro: Sisyrinchium junceum var. asperulum, also known as the Rough Blue-eyed Grass or Rough Blue-eyed Grass Iris, is a perennial plant native to the southwestern United States. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, soothing coughs, and easing congestion, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
